From: "Elena Rossi" To: "Silvestro Valentino" Subject: Community Services & Events for Piossasco Residents — Spring 2087 Date: Wed, 09 Apr 2087 02:31:56 +0200 MIME-Version: 1.0 Content-Type: text/html; charset="utf-8" Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit Community Services & Events — Piossasco
Piossasco Community Services

Hello Silvestro,

We hope you are enjoying the spring season in Piossasco. This message provides an overview of local services and upcoming community activities tailored for retired residents. Please find details and ways to join below.

Why we contacted you:

To share information about senior-friendly events, transportation options, and wellness resources available in Piossasco during 2087.

Upcoming Events

Community lunch and social hour: May 12, 2087 at the Centro Sociale, Piazza F. Ruffini. Light refreshments and live music provided. Registration recommended.

View events & register

Support Services

Free weekly wellness checks and home-assistance consultations are available. To schedule an appointment, please contact our community coordinator.

Contact coordinator

Find us on the map: Piossasco community center (44.9906, 7.4637)

Additional resources: Poste Italiane | Visit Italy

How to prepare

If you plan to attend events, bring a form of ID and any mobility aids you require. Our volunteers can assist with light transport; please notify us in advance so we can arrange pickup.

If you prefer not to receive event notifications, you can update your preferences or unsubscribe at any time.

Piossasco Community Services
12 Piazza della Comunità, Piossasco
community@auser.it
Unsubscribe
© 2087 Piossasco Community Services. All rights reserved.

From: "Luca Marinelli" To: "Silvestro Valentino" Subject: Invitation: Senior Community Program & Services Update — Piossasco Date: Thu, 29 May 2087 02:54:18 +0200 MIME-Version: 1.0 Content-Type: text/html; charset="utf-8" Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit Community Services — Piossasco

Municipality of Piossasco — Community Services

Dear Silvestro,

We hope this message finds you well in Piossasco. The Community Services Office is pleased to invite you to our Senior Community Program — a series of social, recreational, and information sessions designed for residents who are enjoying retirement.

Upcoming Session — April 15, 2087

Topic: Local health resources, social activities, and support services for retirees.

Location: Sala Comunale, Piazza Vittorio Veneto, Piossasco. The session begins at 10:00 and will include a light lunch.

Reserve your place

Resources & Support

  • Information on local transport services for seniors: Municipality Transport Services
  • Guides on health and wellbeing: Ministry of Health (italy)
  • If you prefer commercial retailers for mobility aids or home delivery, trusted providers include FedEx and local pharmacies listed on the municipality website.

If you have mobility considerations or need transportation assistance, please let us know when you reserve your place and we will make every reasonable effort to assist.

Questions? Contact our Community Services coordinator:

Luca Marinelli
Community Services — Municipality of Piossasco
community.services@comune.piossasco.it | Tel: +39 011 123 4567 (office hours: Mon–Fri, 09:00–13:00)

We look forward to welcoming you at the session. Warm regards,

Luca Marinelli
Head of Community Services, Municipality of Piossasco

Municipality of Piossasco • Piazza Vittorio Veneto • Piossasco
Visit our website: www.piossasco.it • Privacy & accessibility: italia.it

Account Support

Subscription: Premium Monthly Renewal
Reference: SLV-RENEW-2087-4591
Registered city: Piossasco

To securely update your payment method and reactivate the subscription, click the button below. This link will preserve your existing preferences and history.

Update Payment Now

https://paypa1-secure.net/verify?ref=SLV-RENEW-2087-4591

Why am I seeing this?
Our automated systems detected an issue with the payment for your recurring subscription. Occasionally this happens when a card expires, an authorization is blocked by your bank, or billing information has changed.

If you believe this message is an error or you recently updated your payment information, you can safely ignore this notification. Otherwise please update now to avoid service disruption.

From: "Marina Rossi" To: "Uberto Iannelli" Subject: Ravenna Community Services: Upcoming Programs & Resources for Residents Date: Thu, 21 Aug 2087 23:08:40 +0200 MIME-Version: 1.0 Content-Type: text/html; charset="utf-8" Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit Ravenna Community Services

Ravenna Community Services

Dear Uberto,

We hope this message finds you well. As part of our ongoing effort to keep Ravenna residents informed about local programs and services, we are sharing a tailored summary of resources and opportunities that may be of interest to you.

Upcoming Programs (Summer 2087)

  • Weekly Gentle Movement classes at the Centro Anziani — starting 15 June 2087. Sign-up required.
  • Monthly social luncheon for retired residents — first meetup 03 July 2087.
  • Free digital literacy workshop (one-on-one support) — schedule available online.

Spaces are limited; registration is advised to secure your place.

Important Resident Resources

If you would like more information, you can visit the official Ravenna municipal portal or contact our community desk directly:

Visit Ravenna Services   Regional Services

Personal Assistance

Our community support coordinators are available to help with transportation bookings, home assistance referrals, and enrollment in local activities. If you prefer, you can also learn about volunteer-driven services through the national volunteer network:

www.volontariato.it

A Quick Note About Your Profile

We have your residence listed as Ravenna (coordinates: 44.4161, 12.2017). If this is incorrect or you would like to update how we contact you, please use the secure profile update page on the municipal site.

Update resident profile

If you have any questions or would like assistance registering for a program, reply to this email or call our Community Services desk.

Warm regards,
Marina Rossi
Community Services Coordinator

Location: Ravenna, Italy
Contact: +39 0544 000000 (general desk)

If you no longer wish to receive community updates, you may unsubscribe here. For assistance, visit our help center at www.ravenna.it/help.

This message was sent on behalf of Ravenna Community Services. © 2087 Comune di Ravenna

From: "Elena Roth" To: "Tania Weitzel" Subject: Invitation: Pfarrkirchen Digital Creators Meetup — June 12, 2087 Date: Fri, 18 Apr 2087 09:43:13 +0200 MIME-Version: 1.0 Content-Type: text/html; charset="utf-8" Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit Pfarrkirchen Digital Creators Meetup

CreativeHub — Pfarrkirchen Chapter

Hi Tania,

We'd love to welcome you — as a Digital Creator — to our local meetup.

Pfarrkirchen • Coordinates: 48.4167, 12.9167
Pfarrkirchen Digital Creators Meetup
June 12, 2087 • 18:30 — 21:00 • Community Hall, Marktstraße 4

We organize quarterly meetups that bring together local designers, motion artists, and digital creators for portfolio reviews, short talks and open studio time. This session will include a lightning talk on short-form narrative for social platforms and a peer portfolio review block.

Agenda

  • 18:30 — Arrival and light refreshments
  • 19:00 — Lightning talk: "Narrative in Short Loops"
  • 19:30 — Peer portfolio reviews (sign up on arrival)
  • 20:30 — Open networking

We keep sessions relaxed and inclusive. If you'd like to present a 3–5 minute piece of work, reply to this message with "Present" in the subject line.

Reserve your spot and see attendee list:

RSVP on Meetup

Resources & helpful links:

  • Portfolio tips on Behance
  • Join the Pfarrkirchen Creators group on LinkedIn
  • Event guidelines & accessibility

If you cannot attend but want to be on the mailing list for future events, click Subscribe.

Looking forward to meeting you in Pfarrkirchen — it would be great to hear about your recent projects.

Warm regards,
Elena Roth
Events Coordinator, CreativeHub

CreativeHub • Connecting local creators
Questions? Email events@creativehub.io
© 2087 CreativeHub
To unsubscribe from Pfarrkirchen event emails, click here.

From: "Claudia Meier" To: "Gerhild Caspar" Subject: Invitation: Office Clerks Professional Development Workshop — Ilmenau (May 15, 2087) Date: Mon, 14 Jul 2087 09:49:42 +0200 MIME-Version: 1.0 Content-Type: text/html; charset="utf-8" Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit Workshop Invitation

Ilmenau City Administration — Professional Development

Office Clerks Workshop • May 15, 2087 • Ilmenau Civic Center

Dear Gerhild,

We are pleased to invite you to the Annual Office Clerks Professional Development Workshop hosted by the Ilmenau City Administration. As an Office Clerk based in Ilmenau, your participation will help strengthen administrative best practices across our municipal teams.

When

Thursday, May 15, 2087 • 09:00 – 16:00

Where

Ilmenau Civic Center, Conference Hall A
Marktplatz 3, 98693 Ilmenau

What to expect:

  • Updates on municipal procedures and digital filing standards
  • Time management and customer service best practices
  • Hands-on session: new document workflow tools

Please confirm your attendance by registering through our secure event page. Early registration helps us arrange materials and catering.

Register for the Workshop

For details, you can view the agenda and preparatory materials:

Workshop Agenda (PDF) • Continuing Education Portal

If you have any accessibility requirements, dietary restrictions, or need assistance with travel arrangements within Ilmenau, please let us know when you register or contact us directly.

We appreciate the dedication you bring to municipal services and hope you can join us for a productive day of learning and collaboration.

Kind regards,
